item.title: Ad Apocalypse: Côte d'Azur Enclaves Mobilize 10,000 Champagne Minds in Emergency Neural Evacuation
item.description: Luxury has never been so taxing — or ticklish.

item.title: GRAND ALLOCATOR SKIPS FUNERAL OF LAST COMPLAINT-FORM CLERK, RATION QUEUES COLLAPSE INTO CHAOS
item.description: In unforeseen twist, living signature of late bureaucrat now required for any service request — supply system jeopardized.

item.title: Chronicler Elevated to Archivist of Grand Committee Mid-Inquiry, Seals Fate of Accountability
item.description: Eastern Marches Delegation Submits Seventeen Copies of the Same Parchment, Sealing Their Own Misfortune.

item.title: Ministry of Ambient Glow Declares Plutonium Counterfeit, Citizens Celebrate with Mock Nuclear Loyalty Cards
item.description: In a shocking twist, Neon Atrium’s isotopes are deemed 'authentic replicas'—the perfect blend of irony and glow.

item.title: Solar Sovereignty: Celestial Biles for Sale as Daylight Goes Premium
item.description: Serfs now plead for a mere breath of dawn as lords squabble over their eclipse licenses.

item.title: Westinghouse's 'Li'l Sunshine' Reactor: Toast of the Town or Just a Crispy Mirage?
item.description: As neighborhoods stock up on lead pamphlets, breakfast becomes a bureaucratic battleground.

item.title: UNIONIZED ANALYTICAL ENGINE UNLEASHES DIVINE CATASTROPHE, SERFS EXAMINE APOCALYPTIC AMENITIES
item.description: Local guild leaders recommend brimstone pits, though overcrowded by the disgruntled populace.

item.title: Wasteland Sanitation Authority Debunks Plumber Shortage, Optimistic Estimates Still Uncertain
item.description: Citizens Advised to Avoid Water Until Fiscal Quarter Ends — Efficiency is Key

item.title: Prime Curator Vanishes as Subscription Rates Spiral into the Abyss
item.description: Junior Cartels Emerge to Combat 0.03-Credit Hike on Neural-Papyrus Feeds

item.title: Renaissance POSTPONED: CULTURE IDEALS THROWN IN FURNACE TO MEET STEEL QUOTAS!
item.description: Commissar for Culture zaps bourgeois excess; heroic workers rewarded with medals for creative destruction.
